Package noppes.npcs.api.handler.data

Interface IAuctionListing

  • public interface IAuctionListing
    Represents an auction listing.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      int getBidCount()
      Get the total number of bids placed.
      long getBuyoutPrice()
      Get the buyout price (0 if no buyout).
      long getCreatedTime()
      Get when the listing was created (Unix timestamp in ms).
      long getCurrentBid()
      Get the current highest bid.
      long getEndTime()
      Get when the auction ends (Unix timestamp in ms).
      String getHighBidderName()
      Get the high bidder's display name (null if no bids).
      String getHighBidderUUID()
      Get the high bidder's UUID as a string (null if no bids).
      String getId()
      Get the unique listing ID.
      IItemStack getItem()
      Get the item being sold.
      long getMinimumBid()
      Get the minimum bid amount (current bid + increment).
      long getRemainingTime()
      Get the remaining time in milliseconds.
      String getRemainingTimeFormatted()
      Get the remaining time formatted as a string (e.g., "2h 30m").
      String getSellerName()
      Get the seller's display name.
      String getSellerUUID()
      Get the seller's UUID as a string.
      long getStartingPrice()
      Get the starting price.
      int getStatus()
      Get the auction status.
      boolean hasBids()
      Check if there are any bids on this listing.
      boolean hasBuyout()
      Check if this listing has a buyout option.
      boolean isActive()
      Check if the auction is still active (can be bid on).
      boolean isExpired()
      Check if the auction has expired.
      boolean isHighBidder​(String playerUUID)
      Check if a player UUID is the current high bidder.
      boolean isSeller​(String playerUUID)
      Check if a player UUID is the seller.

    • Method Detail

      • getId

        String getId()
        Get the unique listing ID.
        Returns:
        the unique listing ID

      • getSellerUUID

        String getSellerUUID()
        Get the seller's UUID as a string.
        Returns:
        the seller's UUID

      • getSellerName

        String getSellerName()
        Get the seller's display name.
        Returns:
        the seller's display name

      • getItem

        IItemStack getItem()
        Get the item being sold.
        Returns:
        the item being auctioned

      • getStartingPrice

        long getStartingPrice()
        Get the starting price.
        Returns:
        the starting bid price in currency

      • getBuyoutPrice

        long getBuyoutPrice()
        Get the buyout price (0 if no buyout).
        Returns:
        the instant buyout price in currency

      • hasBuyout

        boolean hasBuyout()
        Check if this listing has a buyout option.
        Returns:
        true if this listing has a buyout option

      • getCurrentBid

        long getCurrentBid()
        Get the current highest bid.
        Returns:
        the current highest bid amount

      • getHighBidderUUID

        String getHighBidderUUID()
        Get the high bidder's UUID as a string (null if no bids).
        Returns:
        the UUID of the current highest bidder

      • getHighBidderName

        String getHighBidderName()
        Get the high bidder's display name (null if no bids).
        Returns:
        the name of the current highest bidder

      • hasBids

        boolean hasBids()
        Check if there are any bids on this listing.
        Returns:
        true if any bids have been placed

      • getBidCount

        int getBidCount()
        Get the total number of bids placed.
        Returns:
        the total number of bids placed

      • getCreatedTime

        long getCreatedTime()
        Get when the listing was created (Unix timestamp in ms).
        Returns:
        the timestamp when this listing was created

      • getEndTime

        long getEndTime()
        Get when the auction ends (Unix timestamp in ms).
        Returns:
        the timestamp when this listing ends

      • getRemainingTime

        long getRemainingTime()
        Get the remaining time in milliseconds.
        Returns:
        the remaining time in milliseconds

      • isExpired

        boolean isExpired()
        Check if the auction has expired.
        Returns:
        true if the listing has ended

      • isActive

        boolean isActive()
        Check if the auction is still active (can be bid on).
        Returns:
        true if the listing is still accepting bids

      • getStatus

        int getStatus()
        Get the auction status.
        Returns:
        0 = Active, 1 = Ended, 2 = Cancelled, 3 = Claimed

      • getMinimumBid

        long getMinimumBid()
        Get the minimum bid amount (current bid + increment).
        Returns:
        the minimum bid amount required

      • isSeller

        boolean isSeller​(String playerUUID)
        Check if a player UUID is the seller.
        Parameters:
        playerUUID - the player UUID to check
        Returns:
        true if this player is the seller

      • isHighBidder

        boolean isHighBidder​(String playerUUID)
        Check if a player UUID is the current high bidder.
        Parameters:
        playerUUID - the player UUID to check
        Returns:
        true if this player is the current highest bidder

      • getRemainingTimeFormatted

        String getRemainingTimeFormatted()
        Get the remaining time formatted as a string (e.g., "2h 30m").
        Returns:
        the remaining time as a human-readable string
